name: Squad AI Product Manager MCP Server
what_it_does: AI Product Manager MCP server from Basilisk AI that surfaces insights, builds roadmaps, and plans strategy. Enables AI agents to assist with product management workflows — analyzing product data, generating roadmap suggestions, identifying priorities, and supporting strategic planning for product teams.
use_cases: Generating roadmap recommendations and priority analysis from product strategy agents
Surfacing product insights from data for PM decision-support agents
Building strategic product plans from AI-driven product management workflows
Analyzing feature requests and user feedback for product planning agents
not_for: Teams with established PM tools (Jira, Linear, Productboard) without Squad integration
Replacing human product judgment — AI PM tools support, not replace, PMs
Real-time user feedback analysis at scale without Squad backend
best_when: A product manager or team wants AI agents to assist with roadmap planning, priority analysis, and strategic product decisions — using Squad's AI PM framework as the reasoning backbone.
avoid_when: You don't have Squad subscription or prefer other PM tools. AI PM tools work best as supplements to, not replacements for, experienced product judgment.

auth.notes: Squad API credentials required. Basilisk AI Squad subscription needed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Squad free tier available; paid for full features
pricing.paid_tiers: Squad paid tiers for full PM capabilities
pricing.notes: Squad by Basilisk AI has freemium model. MCP server is open source.

known_agent_gotchas: Product roadmap data may be sensitive business information — control access carefully
AI PM suggestions require human product judgment — never auto-implement roadmap changes
Small company product (Basilisk AI) — evaluate stability and support quality
Squad platform integration quality determines MCP server value
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Product roadmap and strategy data is sensitive business information. API credentials must be secured. Restrict access to authorized product team members.

security_score_components.security_notes: Business strategy data sensitivity. API credentials security. Restrict to authorized team members.
